summary: Initialize PhoneBio GSD artifacts and offline Vapi webhook prototype.
Initialized GSD artifacts, offline FastAPI webhook, Node fallback, tests, content, and public GitHub repo.
Live Vapi assistant creation and phone-number assignment pending Vapi credentials, phone-number ID, and public webhook URL.
Added deployment runbook, Docker/Procfile packaging, optional webhook authentication, and dry-run-safe Vapi wiring prerequisites.
Added CI, Vapi webhook fixtures, custom-LLM payload derivation, and enforced the API budget boundary: Vapi now, InsForge later, local Ollama only for LLM.
Added deterministic v1 readiness audit, fixed exact sensor ID matching for LiDAR/UWB, exposed sensor availability, and preserved custom-LLM tool-call payloads through local Ollama forwarding.
Added local Ollama tool-call probe, scrubbed model reasoning before Vapi custom-LLM responses, and fixed custom-LLM URL precedence for explicit Vapi webhook wiring.
Shared optional Vapi bearer-secret auth across /webhook and /custom-llm/chat/completions before public tunnel/host exposure.

Added InsForge forward SQL migration and deterministic local seed JSONL export for protocols, safety sheets, hardware guides, and sensor profiles; fixed folded protocol summaries for voice/export use.
Added local hackathon call-script replay for Vapi demo turns and a centrifuge vibration troubleshooting guide so hardware rehearsal selects the intended local record.
